recommendations.overview: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

recommendations.overview: A group of rock-music-loving students, with the help of the Ramones, take over their school to combat its newly installed oppressive administration.

recommendations.overview: The rise of Aretha Franklin’s career from a child singing in her father’s church’s choir to her international superstardom.

recommendations.title: Feel the Beat
recommendations.overview: After failing to make it on Broadway, April returns to her hometown and reluctantly begins training a misfit group of young dancers for a competition.

recommendations.overview: Under the direction of a ruthless instructor, a talented young drummer begins to pursue perfection at any cost, even his humanity.
